subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Though outwardly we be distant and separated one from another, yet in reality we are gathered together as close friends
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی هر چند بظاهر از همدیگر دور و مهجوریم ولی بحقیقت در محفل سرور و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @unity; oneness of humanity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
